name: Peaches Interplanetary
short_description: Peaches Interplanetary is a short relaxing game about growing peaches on a spaceship. Explore the ship, talk to trees, drink some tea or coffee, and help Margot prepare for her first day spreading the power of peaches throughout the stars.
detailed_description:
Peaches Interplanetary is a short narrative game set aboard a spaceship turned peach farm.

Story

Margot has one dream: to spread fresh peaches to all! For no matter the moon, planet, or asteroid, whether lone ship or crowded station, all throughout the galaxy, everyone deserves a fresh peach! But fresh fruit is a hard thing to find in space. And who else will bring peaches to those in need? It's horrible.

However, the dream of Peaches Interplanetary is yet a dream; Margot's ship is old, the peaches are struggling to grow, and her only companion in the solitude of space is a little robot named Cherry.

But today is the day... The peaches are nervous! Will they be good enough? Join Margot on the morning of her first interplanetary visit, and help her find the courage to begin her dream of a galaxy bright and brimming with peaches.

(This is a small visual novel at heart. Talk to everything multiple times for the full experience!)

Features

  • Cute and colorful pixel art

  • Cozy environments and fun interactions

  • Custom soundtrack of classical songs for space

  • Waffles
